title: Mobs deal .5x damage everyday
description: This mod makes mobs deal more damage each day. You can start the challenge with /damagestart, adjust the current multiplier instantly with /multiplier <value>, and set how much mob damage increases per day with /dailyincrement <value>.
body: This mod makes mobs deal more damage each day. You can start the challenge with /damagestart, adjust the current multiplier instantly with /multiplier <value>, and set how much mob damage increases per day with /dailyincrement <value>.
